reviews.review_description: Great zombie models (compared to other zombie-themed games for the Oculus Go), but too dark to see! Quite scary at times.
Lags when zombies are close to you. Gear vr controls ont work too well and find gun shoot when i wanted to switch weapons etc. Hate the game as it stand. Wish i could get a refund !
The weapon  doesn't really support sideways rotation with the gear controller Wich is a bit weird. Can you fix that?

79p!!!! What a Bargain, you couldn't even get a bag a wotsits for 79p.... I love it when VR is all dark and you have got a little torch, it make you feel proper immersed, this game gives me the willys! Especially when more than one door opens and you turn your head and there is a freaking zombie in your face......79p, you can't even get anything in Poundland for 79p! Well only if it's after Halloween and they are selling old crappy masks for 50p like they do, anyway 79p will get you one hell of a cool game, thank you development team (smiley face)

I didn't expect it to be such immersive and nice in such cost. Very nice work. This game has potential to be very well. It is much better than some other more costly paid and crap shooting games.

Suggestions:

1. Headshot: Let zoombies die by headshots.

2. Red Eyes: Change zoombies eyes in red color and it will make them more scary.

3. Knife: It did not work very well. Please improve knife attack.

(S7 + Gear VR Black + Ipega Controller)

reviews.review_title: First played on daydream, now, Oculus go
reviews.review_description: Loved this game so much on my daydream that I purchased it on my Oculus go. However, I could not complete the game on the daydream. I would get to elevator 10 then I was stuck. Could not get the upgrades I was needing to complete that elevator. And I must have played for a good three or four hundred hours. Purchased it on the Oculus go hoping things would be different. Here I am back to the same thing. Playing elevators over and over and over again an attempt to get a very specific weapon upgrade. When I game is as difficult as this it becomes boring and frustrating.  None of the elevators were overly difficult, but 10... Is just insane. Not quite sure what the drop rate is as I feel like I am meeting what one would assume would be a "drop rate". When killing every single zombie in the head once or maybe twice results in their death, how much more improvement can you make LOL. If I can complete game, I'll give five stars

There needs to be a brighter flashlight option. You have to strain your eyes to see but the game is fun if it were not so darn hard to see anything. The gun upgrade screen is even too dark for my taste. Fix the brightness and I'll come back and give 5 stars.
I want a refund, the game is very bad

I Finnish’s all levels a bunch of times and never gives me the upgrades I’m missing.  
Lost interest in game. After pass numerous times and no reward.

Very dark but this just adds to the atmosphere...level one not too hard but afterwards a different story gory. looking zombies especially the cop ones.you can upgrade gun power...but after level one zombies come from every way.you may not survive long but addictive....at the price bargain

reviews.review_title: Dont let good reviews fool you
reviews.review_description: The game is very dark. You hardly see the zombies coming your way. When the zombies are shot, it doesn't look very realistic. If there was more lighting and you could actually see whats coming your way sooner, then this game would be passable. Just the fact that you're standing in an elevator and looking around in the darkness isn't fun to me. There's games that are free that are better than this

reviews.review_title: I want to like it more
reviews.review_description:
You got to be an expert gamer or computer to get past 4th floor.  If you could play past floors to upgrade n upgrade your
 Crappy flashlight, than it would be fun an challenging, instead of just so aggravating you just uninstall it.
